title: Shrimp & Noodle Stir-Fry
description: This quick and easy Shrimp & Noodle Stir-Fry is a perfect weeknight meal for the whole family, packed with flavor and vegetables. It's designed to be kid-friendly and can be made in one or two pans.
instructions: Cook egg noodles according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and sesame oil to make the stir-fry sauce.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and grated ginger, and stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through. Remove shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add broccoli, carrots, and bell pepper to the same skillet. Stir-fry for 3-5 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Return cooked shrimp and drained noodles to the skillet with the vegetables. Pour the stir-fry sauce over everything.
Toss gently to combine and heat through for 1-2 minutes, ensuring everything is coated in the sauce.
Serve immediately, garnished with sesame seeds if desired.
tips: For picky eaters, you can finely chop the vegetables or offer them on the side.
Adjust the amount of honey or maple syrup in the sauce to suit your family's sweetness preference.
Feel free to substitute other quick-cooking vegetables like snap peas, corn, or thinly sliced cabbage.
